title: PG-Agent & ERP-AuthZBench: Authorization-Preserving LLM Agents over ERP, with a Policy-Closure Compiler
description: A model-agnostic, data-result-plane Policy Enforcement Point (PEP) for ERP LLM agents on Odoo; the ERP-AuthZBench adversarial benchmark for row-level authorization (read + write planes, cross-engine RLS); and PCC-ERP, a policy-closure compiler that derives, emits, and runtime-verifies per-model row closures from the ORM relation graph. Ships a one-command, byte-diff reproducible artifact-evaluation harness. No real data and no private code: runs end-to-end on a synthetic mock.
